faq.question: Does Bonner have storm risk risk?

faq.question: How can I check storm risk risk for a specific property in Bonner?

faq.question: Does storm risk risk affect property insurance in Bonner?
faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Bonner can be influenced by storm risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 4.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
